subject: Geography
title: The Danube
description: A quick, practical guide to The Danube.

hook.text: The Danube flows through ten countries—more than any other river on Earth.

buildup.text: It links Germany to the Black Sea, passing four national capitals along the way.

discovery.text: Romans used the Danube as their northern frontier for centuries.

twist.text: Strauss wrote 'The Blue Danube' waltz, but the river is brown with silt.

climax.text: Today the Danube connects cultures that spent centuries at war with each other.

punchline.text: Ten countries share one winding river.

quiz.question: How many countries does the Danube flow through?
